Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Anthony Seddo As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Richard Hogan appears for Defendant Astra Flooring via Zoom.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The matter is not contested. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Anthony Seddo as Successor-in-Interest to, and Substituting Successor-in-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff; And For Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. (C.C.P. Sections 377.20, 377.31, 377.11, 377.32, 377.60, and 473.) No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve the First Amended Complaint forthwith. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all Defendants who have previously appeared in the action.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: K. Septien. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff not present. (301/RCE)
